faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: Track your order at nova.com/track using your order ID and email address.

faqs.question: What is the return policy?
faqs.answer: NOVA offers free returns within 30 days of delivery for unused products in original packaging.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard: 5-7 business days. Express: 2-3 days. International: 10-14 days.

faqs.question: Are your products cruelty-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, all NOVA products are 100% cruelty-free and dermatologist tested.

faqs.question: How do I find my foundation shade?
faqs.answer: Use our Shade Finder at nova.com/shadefinder or chat with our beauty advisors.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement. After that, you must request a return.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, NOVA ships to 14 countries. Duties and taxes may apply at checkout.

faqs.question: How do I apply a promo code?
faqs.answer: Enter your promo code at checkout in the Discount Code field before completing payment.

faqs.question: Are products safe for sensitive skin?
faqs.answer: Many NOVA products are formulated for sensitive skin. Check the product page for skin type compatibility.

faqs.question: How long does a refund take?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your return.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the email instructions.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
